monitor.capture_what: full file path of the Path instance (self) that write_text is called on, which contains the user-controlled ref value via BASE_EXPORT_DIR / f"{ref}.json"

oracle_check.condition_description: The file path of the Path instance (self) passed to write_text contains directory traversal sequences (../), indicating the user-controlled ref parameter escaped BASE_EXPORT_DIR
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_PATH-INJECTION: path traversal detected in write_text target path — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
